title: Hypselodelphys hirsuta
taxonomy: Hypselodelphys hirsuta is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the order Gentianales and the class Magnoliopsida. The family Rubiaceae is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. Within the family Rubiaceae, Hypselodelphys hirsuta is classified as a member of the order Gentianales, along with other families such as Apocynaceae and Loganiaceae. Further classification of Hypselodelphys hirsuta includes its kingdom as Plantae and its phylum as Angiospermophyta.
